description: This file is a FastAPI router implementation for a defect management backend system. It defines API endpoints for CRUD operations on defects, actions, RCA, attachments, and dashboard data. The file manages various routes with detailed handler logic, including database interactions, data fetching, and response modeling. It also includes endpoints for exporting defect details as a minimal PDF-like document.

methods.name: PagedResponse _paged(meta_total: int, limit: int, offset: int, items: List[Dict[str, Any]])
methods.description: Constructs a paged response object with metadata and items.

methods.name: action_status_history( action_id: UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
create_action( payload: ActionCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), user: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_roles({"production_supervisor", "quality_engineer"})), )

create_attachment_metadata( payload: AttachmentCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), user: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_roles({"operator", "production_supervisor", "quality_engineer"})), )
create_defect( payload: DefectCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), user: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_roles({"operator", "production_supervisor", "quality_engineer"})), )
dashboard_actions_due( db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
dashboard_pareto( db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
dashboard_trends_daily( db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
defect_status_history( defect_id: UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
export_defect_pdf( defect_id: UUID, request: Request, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
get_defect( defect_id: UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
get_rca( defect_id: UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )

list_actions( limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=200), offset: int = Query(0, ge=0), status_filter: Optional[str] = Query(None, alias="status"), due_before: Optional[date] = None, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
list_attachments( defect_id: UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )

list_audit( limit: int = Query(100, ge=1, le=500), offset: int = Query(0, ge=0), entity_type: Optional[str] = None, entity_id: Optional[UUID] = None, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_roles({"quality_engineer"})), )
list_defect_types(db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated))

list_defects( limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=200), offset: int = Query(0, ge=0), status_filter: Optional[str] = Query(None, alias="status"), line_id: Optional[UUID] = None, defect_type_id: Optional[UUID] = None, from_date: Optional[date] = Query(None, description="Filter occurred_at >= from_date"), to_date: Optional[date] = Query(None, description="Filter occurred_at <= to_date"), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
list_lines(db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated))
list_parts(db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated))
list_severity_rules(db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_roles({"quality_engineer"})))
list_shifts(db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated))
update_action( action_id: UUID, payload: ActionUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), user: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_roles({"production_supervisor", "quality_engineer"})), )
update_defect( defect_id: UUID, payload: DefectUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), user: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_roles({"production_supervisor", "quality_engineer"})), )
upsert_rca( defect_id: UUID, payload: RcaUpsert, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), user: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_roles({"quality_engineer"})), )
